name: insurance accounting clerks processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For insurance accounting clerks processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in accurately reconciling premium payments.
features: manual entry for premium payment details
